label: Coupled magnetofluid admits two-parameter double-Beltrami equilibria with non-trivial flow and pressure

provenance.source_span: VOLUME 81, NUMBER 22 PHYSICAL REVIEW LETTERS 30 NOVEMBER 1998 Double Curl Beltrami Flow: Diamagnetic Structures S. M. Mahajan Institute for Fusion Studies, The University of Texa

strengths: Supports the existence of double-Beltrami equilibria with flow and pressure.
weaknesses: Equilibrium existence does not automatically imply spectral stability.
